document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: No development permit shall be issued for a development with a Bedford West

provisions.text: No development permit shall be issued for a development with a Bedford West Comprehensive Development District (BWCDD) Zone except in accordance with a development agreement approved pursuant to policies contained in the Bedford West Secondary Planning Strategy. (RC-Jun 20/06;E-Jul 29/06)

content_blocks.text: 1) No development permit shall be issued for a development with a Bedford West Comprehensive Development District (BWCDD) Zone except in accordance with a development agreement approved pursuant to policies contained in the Bedford West Secondary Planning Strategy. (RC-Jun 20/06;E-Jul 29/06)
